name: injoinic
tagline: Leading Power Management and Fast Charging Solutions
description: Injoinic is a leading Chinese fabless semiconductor company specializing in power management ICs, fast charging protocols, and battery management solutions for consumer electronics and mobile devices.
longDescription: Injoinic Technology, founded in 2014 and headquartered in Shenzhen, China, is a premier fabless semiconductor company focused on power management and fast charging technologies. The company has established itself as a market leader in China's fast charging ecosystem, providing comprehensive solutions for mobile power banks, chargers, TWS earphones, and portable electronic devices. With a strong commitment to innovation, Injoinic holds numerous patents in fast charging protocols and power conversion technologies. Their product portfolio includes industry-leading solutions that support major fast charging standards such as PD, QC, SCP, FCP, and proprietary protocols. The company's products are widely adopted by major brands in the consumer electronics industry, delivering efficient, safe, and reliable power management solutions.

coreProducts.name: Fast Charging Protocol ICs
coreProducts.description: Comprehensive fast charging protocol chips supporting PD, QC, SCP, FCP and more

coreProducts.description: High-efficiency power management solutions for mobile devices and consumer electronics

coreProducts.description: Wireless power transmission solutions for Qi-compatible devices

coreProducts.description: Comprehensive battery protection and management solutions for lithium batteries

seoTitle: Injoinic Distributor - Fast Charging & Power Management ICs
seoDescription: LiTong is an authorized distributor of Injoinic Technology. We supply fast charging protocol ICs, power management chips, wireless charging solutions, and battery management ICs.

faqs.question: Is LiTong an authorized distributor of Injoinic products?
faqs.answer: Yes, LiTong is an authorized distributor of Injoinic Technology. We have established a strategic partnership with Injoinic to provide customers with genuine products, technical support, and competitive pricing. As an authorized distributor, we ensure product authenticity, provide factory warranty support, and offer comprehensive technical services including reference designs, application notes, and FAE support. Our inventory includes the full range of Injoinic products including fast charging protocol ICs, power management chips, wireless charging solutions, and battery management ICs.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our sales team for Injoinic product inquiries, samples, and technical documentation. We can provide competitive pricing for both small and large volume orders.

faqs.question: What are Injoinic's core competitive advantages?
faqs.answer: Injoinic has established several key competitive advantages in the power management and fast charging market. First, they are a market leader in China's fast charging ecosystem with extensive protocol support including PD, QC, SCP, FCP, and proprietary standards. Second, their products offer high integration, reducing BOM cost and design complexity. Third, they provide comprehensive solutions from protocol chips to complete reference designs. Fourth, their products are known for excellent reliability and safety features. Fifth, they offer strong technical support with extensive documentation and application expertise. These advantages make Injoinic a preferred choice for power management solutions in consumer electronics.
faqs.decisionGuide: For projects requiring fast charging or power management solutions, Injoinic offers cost-effective, highly integrated options. Contact us to discuss your specific requirements.

faqs.question: How do Injoinic products compare to international brands?
faqs.answer: Injoinic products offer competitive performance compared to international brands while providing better cost-effectiveness and local support. Their fast charging protocol ICs support all major standards including USB PD, Qualcomm QC, Huawei SCP, and Samsung AFC, matching the compatibility of international competitors. Injoinic's power management ICs feature comparable efficiency and protection features. The key advantages include faster local technical support, shorter lead times, more flexible MOQ policies, and competitive pricing. For the China market and export manufacturing, Injoinic provides significant advantages in supply chain efficiency and cost optimization.
faqs.decisionGuide: Consider Injoinic for cost-sensitive projects requiring fast charging or power management. We can provide comparison analysis with international brands for your specific application.

faqs.question: What are the advantages of purchasing Injoinic products through LiTong?
faqs.answer: Purchasing Injoinic products through LiTong provides multiple advantages. As an authorized distributor, we guarantee genuine products with full factory warranty. We maintain strategic inventory for fast delivery on popular models. Our technical team includes experienced FAEs who can provide application support, schematic review, and debugging assistance. We offer flexible payment terms and competitive pricing for various volume levels. Additionally, we provide value-added services including reference designs, application notes, and customized solutions. Our close relationship with Injoinic ensures priority access to new products and technical resources.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our sales team for a quotation and to discuss how we can support your project with Injoinic solutions. We offer samples for evaluation.

faqs.question: What fast charging protocols does Injoinic support?
faqs.answer: Injoinic provides comprehensive support for all major fast charging protocols in the market. Their protocol ICs support USB Power Delivery (PD) 3.0/3.1 with PPS, Qualcomm Quick Charge (QC) 2.0/3.0/4.0/5.0, Huawei SuperCharge Protocol (SCP) and Fast Charge Protocol (FCP), Samsung Adaptive Fast Charging (AFC), MediaTek Pump Express (PE) 1.1/2.0/3.0/4.0, and OPPO VOOC. This extensive protocol support enables designers to create universal charging solutions compatible with devices from all major manufacturers. Injoinic's protocol chips handle automatic protocol detection and negotiation, simplifying the design process.
faqs.decisionGuide: For multi-protocol charging solutions, Injoinic offers highly integrated options. Contact us to select the right protocol IC for your application.

faqs.question: What applications are Injoinic products suitable for?
faqs.answer: Injoinic products are designed for a wide range of consumer electronics and mobile device applications. Their fast charging protocol ICs are ideal for power banks, wall chargers, car chargers, and charging docks. Power management ICs suit smartphones, tablets, TWS earphones, and portable electronics. Wireless charging ICs enable Qi-compatible charging pads and devices. Battery management ICs provide protection and monitoring for lithium battery packs in various applications. The products are widely used in mobile accessories, smart home devices, IoT products, and portable electronics, offering comprehensive power solutions across the consumer electronics ecosystem.
faqs.decisionGuide: Identify your power requirements and charging needs, then contact us to select the optimal Injoinic solution for your application.

faqs.question: Does Injoinic provide reference designs and technical documentation?
faqs.answer: Yes, Injoinic provides comprehensive technical support including detailed datasheets, application notes, reference designs, and evaluation boards. Their reference designs cover typical applications such as power banks, chargers, and wireless charging pads, providing complete schematics, PCB layouts, and BOM lists. Application notes offer detailed guidance on protocol implementation, thermal management, and optimization techniques. Injoinic also provides software tools for configuration and debugging. Through LiTong, customers can access these resources and receive additional technical support from our FAE team for design review and troubleshooting.
faqs.decisionGuide: Request reference designs and technical documentation from our team when evaluating Injoinic products for your project.

faqs.question: What is the typical lead time for Injoinic products?
faqs.answer: Lead times for Injoinic products vary depending on the specific part and order quantity. Standard products typically have lead times of 4-8 weeks for production orders. LiTong maintains inventory of popular models for immediate delivery on sample and small volume orders. For high-volume production orders, we recommend placing orders in advance to ensure supply continuity. Injoinic's domestic manufacturing advantage often results in shorter lead times compared to international suppliers. Contact our sales team for current lead time information and to discuss your forecast and scheduling requirements.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact us with your forecast requirements to ensure supply continuity. We can discuss inventory programs for high-volume production.
